# Page 1^page=1
neoception HARTING PoC Neoception Digital Twin Infrastructure (DTI)

# Page 2^page=2
neoception 21 HARTING PoC Feedback 3 4 1.Säule AAS Generierung 2.Säule Standard Infrastruktur 3.Säule Visualisierung/Viewer Offene Diskussion

# Page 3^page=3
neoception DTI Roadmap Version 1.2 – Q2 2026 • External Submodel Repository Integration o Connect external repositories to provide submodel templates • Enhanced Relevance Score Transparency o Better insight into how data and template rules are scored • RBAC for Viewer and AAS Repository API o Role-based access control across viewer and API layers • Multi-Connector Support o Operate multiple connectors in parallel • Repository API Performance Optimization o Faster response times and improved scalability • Unified ID Schema for AAS and Submodel IDs o Consistent identifier scheme • Connector Context Elements o Contextual metadata for data and template rules • Advanced Filtering for Data Point Selection o Refined filters in data rule mapping Version 1.3 – Q3 2026 What's improving for you in the next releases • Repository API Extension & Validation o Full /serialization endpoint support and complete IDTA AdX Hub conformance • Extended Metamodel Coverage o Support for Range, RelationshipElement, Entity, and the valueId attribute • Data-Driven Mapping o Mapping of lists, arrays, objects, and complex data structures • Semantic Mapping o Optional semantics from data points used to assist template mapping • UI & UX Improvements o Incl. Collapsible filter rows, data point tooltips • Stability & Bug Fixes o Continuous quality improvements based on customer feedback

# Page 4^page=4
neoception DTI Roadmap • Continuous Stability & Optimization o Ongoing bug fixes and performance improvements • API Backchannel o Extending the API beyond read operations with PUT and POST support • Backoffice UI Refinements o Usability improvements across Designer and related tools • Backoffice Monitoring o Operational insights and system health visibility in the backoffice • Validation & Transparency o Query item IDs in the backoffice to inspect matching rules, applied templates, and resulting AAS • Dashboard Update Notifications o Surface relevant updates and release info directly in the dashboard • Template Grouping & Versioning o Improved organization and version management for templates • Enhanced Data Mapping Information o Clearer visibility of mandatory fields, value types, and metadata • Filter Data Points by Item ID Response o Refined filtering in the data mapping view • Extended Viewer Search o Search across property names in addition to existing fields • Viewer Analytics o Usage insights and analytics capabilities directly in the viewer • Caching & Buffering o Improved throughput and response times through caching of frequently accessed data and buffering of incoming data streams Further enhancements on our radar

# Page 5^page=5
